GPT-5.4.role: Prover A; sole reviewer for B1 and B2

DeepSeek V3.2.role: Prover B; judge in graduated dissent

GPT-5.4 (judge in scoring).role: LLM-as-judge for matching predictions to SPOT annotations

thresholds.comment: Graduated dissent escalation: L0 if agreement>=0.90, L1 if SNR=(1-agreement)/theta_noise<1, L2 otherwise (steelman exchange triggered).

id_mapping_note: Original SPOT DOIs were renamed paper_001..paper_020 (alphabetic order) for this validation package; the mapping is in config/id_mapping.csv.
